sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Racing Physics
special_mechanics.description: Formula One racing simulation with selectable transmission types (manual/automatic)

special_mechanics.name: V.R. View System
special_mechanics.description: Four selectable camera views during gameplay

tier_notes: Tier 2: Racing game with no documented player character movement parameters. Physics data pertains to vehicle dynamics, not character movement. Source material focuses on arcade hardware, cabinet versions, and port history rather than detailed physics documentation.
note: This is a racing game, not a character platformer. No jump physics, gravity, or character movement parameters are applicable or documented. Vehicle acceleration, top speed, and handling characteristics would be the relevant physics parameters, but these are not detailed in available sources.
